structured_payload_candidate.title: Energy Audit Planning Tools

evidence_text:

TOOLS FOR THE

judge_reason: Generic mention of free templates; no operational HVAC-specific content that can be reviewed.

structured_payload_candidate.sequence_steps: Preliminary Walkthrough, SAFETY toolbox meeting, Equipment Checks, Data Collection, Interviews, Documentation

structured_payload_candidate.title: Audit Data Analysis Tools
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Data analysis for audits utilizes RETScreen, Excel, and ASHRAE forms.

evidence_text:
Conducting the Audit
•Data Analysis –RETScreen +
Excel + ASHRAE Forms

judge_reason: Lists general analysis tools (RETScreen, Excel) for audits, not controller-specific or reviewable operational guidance.
